mapper.select: SELECT m.* FROM sys_menu m JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.menu_id = rm.menu_id WHERE rm.role_id = #{roleId} AND m.status = 0 ORDER BY m.order_num
SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM sys_menu m JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.menu_id = rm.menu_id JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.status = 0 ORDER BY m.order_num
SELECT menu_id FROM sys_role_menu WHERE role_id = #{roleId}
